records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle, I saw the HRT Berry livestream yesterday. You were really trying your best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle, I saw the HRT Berry livestream yesterday. You were really trying your best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle, I saw the HRT Berry livestream yesterday. You were really trying your best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The results may have been unsatisfactory, but no need to be so disappointed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The results may have been unsatisfactory, but no need to be so disappointed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The results may have been unsatisfactory, but no need to be so disappointed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who said anything about being disappointed? She stole my prize!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who said anything about being disappointed? She stole my prize!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who said anything about being disappointed? She stole my prize!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, you mean that Mi Rinae person? Everyone seems to be talking about her these days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, you mean that Mi Rinae person? Everyone seems to be talking about her these days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, you mean that Mi Rinae person? Everyone seems to be talking about her these days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She seemed to know Ms. Jin well. Who the heck is she anyway?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She seemed to know Ms. Jin well. Who the heck is she anyway?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She seemed to know Ms. Jin well. Who the heck is she anyway?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am certain she is no ordinary individual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am certain she is no ordinary individual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am certain she is no ordinary individual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though she has not demonstrated her skills, I could feel that she was a veteran.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though she has not demonstrated her skills, I could feel that she was a veteran.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though she has not demonstrated her skills, I could feel that she was a veteran.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph, just you wait! I'll wipe that smug look off her face next time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph, just you wait! I'll wipe that smug look off her face next time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph, just you wait! I'll wipe that smug look off her face next time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You got guts to be chatting during class!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You got guts to be chatting during class!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You got guts to be chatting during class!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I wasn't the only one!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I wasn't the only one!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I wasn't the only one!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't I say I'd be keeping an eye on you? I suggest you don't let your guard down during my class.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't I say I'd be keeping an eye on you? I suggest you don't let your guard down during my class.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't I say I'd be keeping an eye on you? I suggest you don't let your guard down during my class.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can hold a grudge for a long time, you know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can hold a grudge for a long time, you know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can hold a grudge for a long time, you know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right. I just heard that you were going to participate in the Counters Tournament.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right. I just heard that you were going to participate in the Counters Tournament.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right. I just heard that you were going to participate in the Counters Tournament.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I don't see why not if it's going to greatly reflect my rank.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I don't see why not if it's going to greatly reflect my rank.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I don't see why not if it's going to greatly reflect my rank.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure whoever enters will be a piece of cake for me to beat anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure whoever enters will be a piece of cake for me to beat anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure whoever enters will be a piece of cake for me to beat anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... So it's true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... So it's true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... So it's true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Actually, I'll be participating in it, too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Actually, I'll be participating in it, too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Actually, I'll be participating in it, too!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? YOU?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? YOU?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? YOU?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Seo told me that there will be a lot of sponsors watching the tournament.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Seo told me that there will be a lot of sponsors watching the tournament.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Seo told me that there will be a lot of sponsors watching the tournament.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There will also be a huge online audience, so I couldn't miss out on the chance!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There will also be a huge online audience, so I couldn't miss out on the chance!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There will also be a huge online audience, so I couldn't miss out on the chance!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Suit yourself. You're no challenge to me, anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Suit yourself. You're no challenge to me, anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Suit yourself. You're no challenge to me, anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's with that tone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's with that tone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's with that tone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle, Mika. I wish the two of you good luck.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle, Mika. I wish the two of you good luck.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle, Mika. I wish the two of you good luck.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yen and I will be rooting for you, so go do your best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yen and I will be rooting for you, so go do your best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yen and I will be rooting for you, so go do your best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on! They were the ones talking this time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come on! They were the ones talking this time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come on! They were the ones talking this time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew you'd participate, Naielle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew you'd participate, Naielle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew you'd participate, Naielle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I hope you give it your all, just like your friend said.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I hope you give it your all, just like your friend said.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I hope you give it your all, just like your friend said.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because it wouldn't look good on me if the self-proclaimed "elite" gets eliminated in the first rounds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because it wouldn't look good on me if the self-proclaimed "elite" gets eliminated in the first rounds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because it wouldn't look good on me if the self-proclaimed "elite" gets eliminated in the first rounds.
